purpose: Fresh local MOD-17 Canny quality matrix sample testing softer 0.36/0.52 ControlNet guidance against the v3 right-edge-masked control input.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic cinematic editorial portrait, natural skin texture with fine pores, subtle human skin asymmetry, realistic eyes with clean catchlights and visible iris detail, softly open eye shadows, detailed natural hair, natural composition guided by edges without hard outlines, coherent face silhouette, clean jawline, separated neck and shirt collar, tailored dark blazer over textured shirt, clothed shoulders, soft natural fill light, balanced exposure, calm plain continuous neutral interior background, seamless right image edge, no visible wall panel boundary, clean face with no painted marks, lifelike lens rendering
